evals.prompt: I'm adding a new OrderRepository that depends on Dio and a local Hive database. How do I register it with injectable/get_it?
evals.expected_output: @LazySingleton on impl, @injectable module for Dio/Hive, register as abstract interface (as: IOrderRepository), constructor injection

evals.prompt: My CartBloc is keeping old cart state when I navigate away and come back. It should reset each time.
evals.expected_output: Change CartBloc registration from @singleton/@lazySingleton to @injectable (Factory) so a new instance is created each time

evals.prompt: How do I swap out the real AuthRepository with a mock in my widget tests?

should_not_trigger: How do I pass data between two screens?
Add a constructor parameter to a widget
Write a unit test for the login use case
Set up Firebase dependencies in pubspec.yaml
